pixfrog

LED-pixel controller firmware for the ESP32-P4.

Plug the board into a USB port, then click Connect and pick its serial port. The flasher erases the chip and installs the latest firmware.

Web Serial isn’t available in this browser — use desktop Chrome or Edge. This page must be served over HTTPS to flash.

Prefer the command line? The release also ships pixfrog-merged.bin (flash at 0x0) plus the individual bootloader.bin / partition-table.bin / pixfrog.bin parts.
